directions.name: baseline-handcrafted-yaml
directions.description: Direct 1:1 structural mapping of BSV constructs to YAML fields (bsv_typedef). Template-based Python compiler (no LLM).
directions.verdict: Compiles but no abstraction benefit; YAML larger than BSV; language-dependent

directions.name: declarative-yaml-llm-compiler
directions.description: Declarative natural-language YAML descriptions + LLM-based BSV generation. Functions described with behavioral descriptions, not code snippets.
directions.verdict: Functionally correct but YAML 3.75x larger than BSV. AL and LIS improved significantly. Need to reduce verbosity.

perturbation_strategies: change YAML abstraction level (more declarative vs more detailed)
change compiler generation strategy (Two-Phase vs Bottom-Up vs Top-Down)
change knowledge template granularity (merge/split knowledge levels)
change type system representation (inline types vs centralized types.yaml)
change connection model (explicit wires vs implicit inference)
change module boundary granularity (more smaller modules vs fewer larger ones)
change natural language description style (algorithmic vs behavioral)
